arts.ttl: Club have spoken to Oliver Glasner’s management – CEO knows Crystal Palace manager well
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have already spoken to Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner’s management ahead of a possible move in the summer. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who adds his information to the growing reports around Glasner and Leipzig. arts.ttl: Key Crystal Palace defender to miss Southampton clash - Oliver Glanser delivers team news
arts.sum: Richards – who featured for the US in their game against Canada over the international break – has played 17 times in the Premier League this season under Glasner. Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Chris Richards will miss Crystal Palace’s Premier League clash at Southampton.

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed
